creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Mon, 7 Dec 1998 jesse@cs.uni-magdeburg.de wrote:

> >Description:
> The port lang/squeak has an unfetchable distfile and is obsolete. 
> A port of the current squeak version exists at lang/squeak2. 

Is squeak2 completly backward compatible?

> >Fix:
> remove the port lang/squeak and rename port lang/squeak2 to lang/squeak

We can remove, we cannot, however move on top of something that once
existed.

If the answer to the question above, though, is yes, removing
ports/lang/squeak would be appropriate.
